description: TV-Clone feature backlog. Set passes=true only after testing end-to-end. Do not remove or rename entries.

features.description: Profile-based login with PIN and password
Role-based permissions (canDownload, canScan, canRestart)
30-day sliding session with HTTP-only cookie
Recursive scan of configured folders, supports mp4/mkv/avi
Movie vs show/episode auto-detection from folder structure
Library cache persisted to disk, loaded on startup
File system watcher auto-invalidates cache on changes
External subtitle detection (.srt, .vtt) in media dir and subs/ subdir
Local poster detection from media directory
OMDB API integration for title, rating, plot, director, actors, genre
OMDB poster download and local caching
IntroDB API integration for automatic intro/outro detection
Direct play for H.264+AAC/MP3 in MP4 (byte-range served, no transcode)
Remux for H.264 with incompatible audio/container
HLS transcode for HEVC and other codecs via FFmpeg
VAAPI hardware acceleration (8-bit full GPU, 10-bit hybrid CPU+GPU)
Multiple audio track selection during playback
Embedded and external subtitle rendering
Playback speed control (0.5x to 2x)
Skip forward/backward buttons in player
Up Next auto-play overlay at end of episode
Max 5 concurrent transcode sessions, idle cleanup after 2 minutes
Background sprite sheet generation (5x5 grid, 10s interval, 160x90)
Seek bar thumbnail preview using sprite sheets
Sprite gen pauses while active transcode session is running
Per-frame 60s timeout in extractFrame() prevents queue hanging on bad files
Sprite gen auto-starts on server restart (not just after scan)
Progress endpoint /api/sprites/progress reports total and completed counts
Playback progress saved per profile (currentTime, duration, percent)
Auto-mark as watched at >=92% progress
Watch history (100 items, most recent first) per profile
Mark watched/unwatched manually
Per-profile Up Next queue with add/remove
Skip intro/outro with countdown UI
Manual intro/outro segment editor in player
Show-level skip segments apply to all episodes, per-episode overrides supported
Add/remove media folders with type selection and file browser
Create/edit/delete user profiles with avatar, PIN, password, role, permissions
System stats dashboard (CPU, RAM, disk, uptime)
Manual library scan trigger
Server restart button (permission-gated)
qBittorrent proxy — search, add, pause/resume, delete torrents
Dark theme with responsive layout (mobile, tablet, desktop)
Real-time search across library
Filter by type (movies/shows) and sort options
Season/episode detail pages
Corrupted file detection — if ffprobe fails on a file, skip sprite gen and flag it in the admin panel rather than silently failing
Corrupted/unreadable files list in admin panel showing files that failed ffprobe or sprite gen
Transcoding quality presets — let user pick quality level (e.g. low/medium/high) instead of fixed QP 22
Advanced search — filter by director, actor, IMDb rating range, genre
Watchlist/favorites — per-profile list separate from queue
Collection grouping — group franchise films (e.g. all Marvel movies) into a collection view
Manual metadata override — let admin edit title, year, poster for any item without relying on OMDB match
Bandwidth/bitrate cap option for transcode sessions
Continue watching row on home page showing in-progress items across all types
Transcode session viewer in admin — see what is currently being transcoded and by whom
External subtitle upload — allow uploading a .srt file for a specific item from the UI
Dismiss from Continue Watching — X button on in-progress items to remove them from the continue watching row without marking as watched
Dismiss from Recently Added — X button on items in the recently added row to hide them from that list per-profile
